	"google.golang.org/protobuf/proto"
)

	bsrFile         = "%s.bsr"
	connectionFile  = "%s.connection"
	channelFile     = "%s.channel"
	messagesFile    = "messages-%s.data"
	requestsFile    = "requests-%s.data"
	sessionMetaFile = "session-meta.json"

	bsrPubKeyFile           = "bsrKey.pub"
	wrappedBsrKeyFile       = "wrappedBsrKey"
	wrappedPrivKeyFile      = "wrappedPrivKey"

- `messagesFile` → `messagesFileNameTemplate` (1 ref)
- `requestsFile` → `requestsFileNameTemplate` (1 ref)
- `channelFile` → `channelFileNameTemplate` (1 ref)
- `bsrFile` → `bsrFileNameTemplate` (2 refs)

The constants `checksumFile`, `metaFile`, and `sigFile` mentioned in the PR description do not exist in the codebase.

All references across `bsr.go`, `container.go`, `bsr_open_test.go`, and `container_test.go` have been updated successfully. No compilation errors were introduced.
